name: @zcaceres/skill-security-openssf-bestpractices
description: Help a FLOSS project earn the OpenSSF Best Practices passing badge at bestpractices.dev. Audits the repo against the self-certification criteria, closes the gaps (SECURITY.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, test/build docs), generates a fill-in worksheet of justifications and evidence URLs, walks through registration, and embeds the badge. Self-attestation, never fabricates a Met answer. Use when the user says 'OpenSSF Best Practices badge', 'bestpractices.dev', 'CII badge', or '/security-openssf-bestpractices'.
